title: Shieldstunfix
description: restores the vanilla shield stun mechanic that Paper broke in 1.21.x (MC-268147).
body:
restores the vanilla shield stun mechanic that Paper broke in 1.21.x (MC-268147).

In vanilla Minecraft, hitting a blocking player with an axe while sprinting disables their shield for 5 seconds. Paper removed this behavior — this plugin brings it back.

How it works:
- A sprinting player hits a shield-blocking player with any axe (wood → netherite)
- The defender's shield is disabled for 5 seconds (100 ticks)
- No commands, no config — just drop it in and it works

**Compatibility:** Paper 1.21.x
